summary: Added Docker install section to root README.md — the Codeberg/GitHub landing page now shows Docker as an install path alongside pipx

details.before: Root README had pipx-only Quick Start; Docker install only in ralph-workflow/README.md (PyPI bundle)
details.after: Root README now has Docker (no Python required) section first with docker run and docker build instructions, then pipx section
details.why: Every repo visitor sees the root README. Dockerfile was deployed (commit 90ff7f811) but the landing page didn't surface it. No-blocker gap closing.
